description: PR Simulator scenario pool metadata (this file lives in web/data/). Creative rows live in scenarios_individual.json, scenarios_small_company.json, and scenarios_corporate.json alongside this file. Runtime merges them in web/lib/scenarios.ts.

glossary.solution_options: The four solutions entries (solution_archetype_id 1–4): strategic PR options the player chooses during Season 1 and Season 2.
glossary.resolution_grid: The arc_resolution object: nine final outcomes (3 visibility bands × 3 effectiveness levels: poor, good, convincing). Used for the ending after Season 2. Not the same as the four solution options.
